title: We need complete reset, says Tottenham chief
summary: Tottenham's chief executive calls for a complete reset of the club, signaling the need for comprehensive structural changes to address ongoing performance and organizational issues. The statement reflects serious concerns about the club's current direction.
content: In a wide-ranging interview, Tottenham chief executive Vinai Venkatesham talks about a number of issues the club needs to address.

zh.title: 热刺主管表示俱乐部需要彻底重建
zh.summary: 热刺首席执行官呼吁对俱乐部进行彻底重建,表明需要进行全面的结构性改革以解决持续存在的性能和组织问题。这一声明反映了对俱乐部当前方向的严重关切。

title: Podcast: Big summer in Edinburgh, what to expect from Hearts & Hibs
summary: A podcast examines the summer outlook for Edinburgh's two major football clubs, Hearts and Hibernian, discussing their current conditions and what supporters can expect in the new season. The episode provides insight into both clubs' preparations and prospects.
content: We ask what condition Hearts and Hibs are in, and what fans can expect next season?

zh.title: 播客:爱丁堡的大夏天,对心形队和希伯尼安队的期待
zh.summary: 一档播客节目审视了爱丁堡两大足球俱乐部心形队和希伯尼安队的夏季前景,讨论了它们的当前状况以及球迷在新赛季可以期待的内容。该节目提供了对两支俱乐部准备和前景的深入了解。

title: Celtic join chase for striker Rodriguez - gossip
summary: Celtic are pursuing La Liga striker Rodriguez as clubs compete for his signature, while a coveted Kilmarnock midfielder has opted to join a newly promoted English Championship club. The moves highlight ongoing activity in the summer transfer market.
content: Celtic keen on La Liga striker as in-demand Kilmarnock midfielder opts to join English Championship newcomers...

zh.title: 凯尔特人加入争夺前锋罗德里格斯的行列 - 转会传闻
zh.summary: 凯尔特人正在追求西甲前锋罗德里格斯,因为各俱乐部竞争争夺他的签约。与此同时,备受青睐的基马诺克中场球员选择加入一支新晋升的英格兰冠军联赛俱乐部。这些转会凸显了夏季转会市场的持续活动。

title: Will 'bruised' Howe and Newcastle address problems in one window?
summary: Newcastle manager Eddie Howe faces pressure to resolve the club's problems during the summer transfer window following a turbulent previous campaign. Success in the transfer market could prove crucial to the club's prospects for the upcoming season.
content: Newcastle certainly have to get this summer right following a turbulent window a year ago.

zh.title: '受挫'的豪和纽卡斯尔能否在一个转会窗口内解决问题？
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔主帅豪面临压力，需要在夏季转会窗口内解决俱乐部的问题，俱乐部此前经历了动荡的赛季。转会市场的成功可能对俱乐部下赛季的前景至关重要。

title: Quiz: Name every Conference League finalist
summary: Crystal Palace compete in the Europa Conference League final with an opportunity to claim their first-ever European trophy. The article includes a quiz challenging fans to name all Conference League finalists.
content: Crystal Palace are in Wednesday's Conference League final and are one match away from their first ever European trophy.

zh.title: 小测验：列举每支欧足联欧洲联赛决赛球队
zh.summary: 水晶宫参加欧足联欧洲联赛决赛，有机会赢得他们首个欧洲奖杯。这篇文章包括一个小测验，要求球迷列举所有欧足联欧洲联赛决赛球队。

title: The footballer setting record straight after 46 years
summary: Roly Gregoire, Sunderland's first Black player, breaks decades of silence about the severe racist abuse he endured during his career, revealing the lasting psychological impact that made him reluctant to discuss his football legacy. His account highlights the historical racism faced by pioneering Black athletes in English football.
content: Roly Gregoire, Sunderland's first black player, sometimes wishes he had never played football because of the racist abuse he found too painful to talk about for 46 years.

zh.title: 足球运动员在46年后讲出真相
zh.summary: 桑德兰队的首位黑人球员罗利·格雷瓜尔打破数十年沉默，讲述了他在职业生涯中遭受的严重种族歧视，揭示了这种经历对他造成的持久心理创伤，这也是他不愿讨论自己足球遗产的原因。他的叙述凸显了英格兰足球中历史性种族主义对开拓性黑人运动员的影响。
